title: Context Window Truncation
constraints: The sliding window must keep the most recent N turns
The system message must always be preserved regardless of truncation
You may not increase the model's context window limit
The agent must remain functional after truncation
hints: Count the number of messages and slice the list to keep only the most recent ones
Always keep the system message at position 0 and truncate only user/assistant pairs
Implement a helper function that trims the history before each call, preserving the system prompt and the last N exchanges

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: History grows without bound — crashes or loses coherence on long conversations
history = [SystemMessage(content="You are a helpful assistant.")]

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append(HumanMessage(content=user_input))
    response = llm.invoke(history)
    history.append(response)
    return response.content

# Simulate a 50-turn conversation
for i in range(50):
    reply = chat(f"Tell me fact number {i + 1} about space exploration.")
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:80]}...")

# By turn 50 the context may exceed limits or degrade
print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from openai.types.responses import ResponseOutputMessage

agent = Agent(
    name="Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant.",
)

# BUG: History grows without bound — crashes or loses coherence on long conversations
history = []

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append({"role": "user", "content": user_input})
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, history)
    response_text = result.final_output
    history.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
    return response_text

# Simulate a 50-turn conversation
for i in range(50):
    reply = chat(f"Tell me fact number {i + 1} about space exploration.")
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:80]}...")

print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

agent = Agent(
    role="Assistant",
    goal="Help users with their questions",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant.",
    llm=llm,
)

# BUG: History grows without bound — crashes or loses coherence on long conversations
history = []

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append(f"User: {user_input}")
    context = "\n".join(history)
    task = Task(
        description=f"Continue this conversation:\n{context}\n\nRespond to the latest message.",
        expected_output="A helpful response",
        agent=agent,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
    result = str(crew.kickoff())
    history.append(f"Assistant: {result}")
    return result

# Simulate a 50-turn conversation
for i in range(50):
    reply = chat(f"Tell me fact number {i + 1} about space exploration.")
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:80]}...")

print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")

evaluationCriteria.label: History stays bounded
evaluationCriteria.description: The message list never exceeds the configured maximum number of messages

evaluationCriteria.label: System message preserved
evaluationCriteria.description: The system message is never dropped during truncation

evaluationCriteria.label: Recent context retained
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent can reference information from the most recent turns after truncation
